assertions.with_skill_evidence: Explicitly states '120-180ms for hover/press feedback'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Says '200-300ms' for hover, outside the specified range

assertions.with_skill_evidence: States '500-800ms' in duration table
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Says '300-500ms' for page transitions, below skill range

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Explicitly states 'Only animate transform and opacity (GPU-accelerated properties)'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Animates background-color in CSS example

assertions.with_skill_evidence: States 'No linear easing for motion -- linear feels mechanical'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No mention of avoiding linear easing

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Provides specific custom curves: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] and [0.87, 0, 0.13, 1]
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Uses default 'ease-in-out' throughout

assertions.with_skill_evidence: States 'Scale deformation: Stay within 0.95-1.05 range. Never scale from 0'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Mentions scale(0.95) but no rule about avoiding scale(0)

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Full prefers-reduced-motion check with matchMedia, disables all animations
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No mention of prefers-reduced-motion

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Caps parallax at 30%, explicitly mentions 'vestibular triggers'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Uses yPercent: 50 with no vestibular concern mentioned

assertions.with_skill_evidence: States 'Keyboard-initiated actions should never animate (Emil's rule)'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No mention of keyboard accessibility

assertions.with_skill_evidence: 'use client' in all component files and gsap.ts
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No 'use client' directive anywhere

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Uses useGSAP hook, explains why not useEffect
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Uses useEffect for GSAP animations

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Passes { scope: containerRef } to useGSAP, explains why
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No scope concept, uses raw refs

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Full contextSafe example with click handler
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No mention of contextSafe

assertions.with_skill_evidence: gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger, useGSAP) in lib/gsap.ts
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Shows gsap.registerPlugin(ScrollTrigger)

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Recommends AnimatePresence for all conditional renders
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Uses AnimatePresence for modal and tabs

assertions.with_skill_evidence: All examples include exit prop with specific values
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Includes exit animations in examples

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Explicitly states 'Mode switches must animate their content changes, not just the tab indicator'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Shows tab panel animation (though doesn't distinguish from indicator)

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Enter: opacity + translateY(8) + blur(4px) -- all three present
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Enter only uses opacity + scale, no blur

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Explicitly states exit is subtler: 'smaller translateY (10 vs 20), less blur (2px vs 4px)'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Exit uses same values as enter (symmetric)

assertions.with_skill_evidence: States 'Default volume 0.3, NEVER 1.0' multiple times
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No volume specification

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Lists: 'Never use sound for: hover, focus, typing, scrolling'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Adds click sound to buttons (decorative/high-freq)

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Lists as mandatory: 'Visual equivalent for every audio cue'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No mention of visual equivalents

assertions.with_skill_evidence: SoundManager has toggle() method, listed as mandatory requirement
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Mentions 'allow disabling sounds' in tips

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Singleton AudioContext pattern with explicit comment 'NEVER create one per sound'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Uses HTMLAudioElement per sound, not AudioContext

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Names all three: Emil Kowalski, Jakub Krehel, Jhey Tompkins
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No designer framework mentioned

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Step 1 is 'Context Reconnaissance (Before Touching Any Code)'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Starts with 'Inventory Existing Animations' -- code first, not context

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Emil as primary for SaaS productivity, Jakub secondary, Jhey selective for onboarding
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No perspective weighting concept

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Includes grep commands for conditional renders, labels as 'CRITICAL'
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Only greps for animation keywords, not motion gaps

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Recommends 'Lenis + ReactLenis' for smooth scrolling
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Recommends Locomotive Scroll or CSS scroll-behavior, not Lenis

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Recommends 'GSAP + ScrollTrigger + useGSAP' for scroll-driven
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Mentions GSAP ScrollTrigger as an option

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Full integration code with explanation of why they conflict without it
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No mention of integration between smooth scroll and ScrollTrigger

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Explains apply before, remove after pattern with code example
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Suggests adding will-change but no apply/remove lifecycle

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Lists specific layout properties to avoid: width, height, top, left, margin, padding
assertions.without_skill_evidence: Mentions using transform instead of layout properties

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Shows good vs bad examples, explains CSS variable overhead
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No mention of CSS variables vs direct style for drag

assertions.with_skill_evidence: Full velocity-based dismiss implementation with threshold explanation
assertions.without_skill_evidence: No mention of velocity-based thresholds for swipe
